Bae Jun-ho.summary: Bae Jun-ho is a South Korea attacking midfielder from Stoke City who adds half-turn receiving, tight-space passing, and final-third invention.
Bae Jun-ho.note: South Korea's creative connector, comfortable receiving between lines and slipping quick passes before the block resets.
Bae Jun-ho.noteZh: 裴俊浩是韩国的创造型连接点，擅长在线间接球，并在防守阵型重置前送出快速传球。

Cho Gue-sung.summary: Cho Gue-sung is a South Korea centre-forward from FC Midtjylland who gives the national team aerial presence, hold-up play, and penalty-box finishing.
Cho Gue-sung.note: South Korea's aerial striker, giving them a clear target for crosses, direct balls, and late pressure in the box.
Cho Gue-sung.noteZh: 曹圭成是韩国的空中型前锋，能在传中、直传和禁区后段施压时提供明确支点。

Cho Wi-je.summary: Cho Wi-je is a South Korea centre-back from Jeonbuk Hyundai Motors who adds size, man-marking, and aerial defending to the squad.
Cho Wi-je.note: South Korea's physical centre-back cover, useful when they need height, tight marking, and cleaner box defending.
Cho Wi-je.noteZh: 曹维济是韩国的身体型中卫保障，在球队需要高度、紧密盯人和更干净的禁区防守时很有用。

Eom Ji-sung.summary: Eom Ji-sung is a South Korea winger from Swansea City who adds one-on-one dribbling, inside carries, and bench attacking tempo.
Eom Ji-sung.note: South Korea can use Eom as a late wide spark, especially for dribbling inside and changing the attack's rhythm.
Eom Ji-sung.noteZh: 韩国可以把严志成用作后段边路火花，尤其适合内切带球并改变进攻节奏。

Hwang Hee-chan.summary: Hwang Hee-chan is a South Korea forward from Wolverhampton Wanderers who adds explosive pressing, channel running, and direct penalty-box threat.
Hwang Hee-chan.note: Hwang gives South Korea vertical force, pressing centre-backs and turning loose transitions into direct shots.
Hwang Hee-chan.noteZh: 黄喜灿为韩国提供纵向冲击，能压迫中卫，并把松散转换变成直接射门。

Hwang In-beom.summary: Hwang In-beom is a South Korea midfielder from Feyenoord who gives the national team build-up passing, pressure resistance, and set-piece quality.
Hwang In-beom.note: South Korea's midfield organizer, trusted to receive under pressure and make the first forward pass cleaner.
Hwang In-beom.noteZh: 黄仁范是韩国的中场组织者，能在压力下接球，并把第一脚向前传得更干净。

Jens Castrop.summary: Jens Castrop is a South Korea central midfielder from Borussia Mönchengladbach who adds Bundesliga intensity, duel pressure, and two-way running.
Jens Castrop.note: Castrop gives South Korea midfield bite, adding duels, counter-pressure, and hard running without slowing possession.
Jens Castrop.noteZh: 卡斯特罗普为韩国中场增加硬度，带来对抗、反抢和持续跑动，同时不会拖慢控球。

Jo Hyeon-woo.summary: Jo Hyeon-woo is a South Korea goalkeeper from Ulsan HD who adds reflex saves, tournament experience, and command of the box.
Jo Hyeon-woo.note: Jo is the experienced keeper option, valuable for reaction saves and calm organization when games get stretched.
Jo Hyeon-woo.noteZh: 赵贤祐是经验丰富的门将选择，在比赛拉开时能提供反应扑救和冷静组织。

Kim Jin-gyu.summary: Kim Jin-gyu is a South Korea central midfielder from Jeonbuk Hyundai Motors who adds simple circulation, late support, and domestic rhythm.
Kim Jin-gyu.note: Kim Jin-gyu keeps midfield possessions tidy, offering short passing, second-ball support, and steady central balance.
Kim Jin-gyu.noteZh: 金镇圭能让韩国中场控球更整洁，提供短传、第二落点支援和稳定的中路平衡。

Kim Min-jae.summary: Kim Min-jae is a South Korea centre-back from Bayern Munich who gives the national team elite defending, recovery speed, and line-breaking passes.
Kim Min-jae.note: South Korea's defensive anchor, able to defend high space, win duels, and start attacks with aggressive passes.
Kim Min-jae.noteZh: 金玟哉是韩国防线锚点，能防守高位空间、赢下对抗，并用有侵略性的传球发起进攻。

Kim Moon-hwan.summary: Kim Moon-hwan is a South Korea right-back from Daejeon Hana Citizen who adds overlap timing, wide defending, and tournament experience.
Kim Moon-hwan.note: Kim Moon-hwan is a reliable right-side runner, helping Korea overlap, recover, and keep wide duels honest.
Kim Moon-hwan.noteZh: 金文焕是韩国可靠的右路跑动点，能帮助球队套边、回追，并稳住边路对抗。

Kim Seung-gyu.summary: Kim Seung-gyu is a South Korea goalkeeper from FC Tokyo who brings experience, distribution, and shot-stopping command.
Kim Seung-gyu.note: Kim Seung-gyu is the senior goalkeeping presence, important for distribution choices and organizing a tense back line.
Kim Seung-gyu.noteZh: 金承奎是韩国资深门将，对出球选择和组织紧张防线都很重要。

Kim Tae-hyeon.summary: Kim Tae-hyeon is a South Korea defender from Kashima Antlers who adds left-footed centre-back cover, recovery defending, and aerial strength.
Kim Tae-hyeon.note: Kim Tae-hyeon gives South Korea left-footed defensive cover, useful for back-line balance and emergency recovery runs.
Kim Tae-hyeon.noteZh: 金太铉为韩国提供左脚防守保障，有助于防线平衡和紧急回追。

Lee Dong-gyeong.summary: Lee Dong-gyeong is a South Korea attacking midfielder from Ulsan HD who adds left-footed passing, shooting range, and between-lines creativity.
Lee Dong-gyeong.note: Lee Dong-gyeong is a left-footed creator who can speed up Korea's attacks with switches and shots from range.
Lee Dong-gyeong.noteZh: 李东炅是左脚创造者，能通过转移球和远射加快韩国进攻。

Lee Gi-hyuk.summary: Lee Gi-hyuk is a South Korea defender from Gangwon FC who adds left-footed centre-back play, composure, and flexible build-up options.
Lee Gi-hyuk.note: Lee Gi-hyuk helps Korea build from the back, giving them a left-footed passer who can still defend the channel.
Lee Gi-hyuk.noteZh: 李基赫帮助韩国从后场组织，提供能传球的左脚中卫，同时还能防守边中通道。

Lee Han-beom.summary: Lee Han-beom is a South Korea centre-back from FC Midtjylland who adds European experience, aerial defending, and recovery power.
Lee Han-beom.note: Lee Han-beom gives the back line younger legs, aerial size, and experience defending in a faster European league.
Lee Han-beom.noteZh: 李韩汎让韩国防线拥有更年轻的腿脚、空中高度，以及在更快欧洲联赛防守的经验。

Lee Jae-sung.summary: Lee Jae-sung is a South Korea attacking midfielder from Mainz 05 who adds pressing intelligence, link play, and late box arrivals.
Lee Jae-sung.note: Lee Jae-sung is Korea's veteran connector, pressing smartly and arriving late when Son or Lee Kang-in draw attention.
Lee Jae-sung.noteZh: 李在城是韩国的老练连接点，能聪明压迫，并在孙兴慜或李刚仁吸引注意后后插上。

Lee Kang-in.summary: Lee Kang-in is a South Korea attacking midfielder from Paris Saint-Germain who adds elite ball security, left-footed creation, and set-piece delivery.
Lee Kang-in.note: Lee Kang-in is Korea's cleanest creator, able to protect the ball and bend the final pass from crowded zones.
Lee Kang-in.noteZh: 李刚仁是韩国最细腻的创造者，能护住球，并在拥挤区域弯出最后一传。

Lee Tae-seok.summary: Lee Tae-seok is a South Korea left-back from Austria Wien who adds width, crossing range, and progressive carries down the flank.
Lee Tae-seok.note: Lee Tae-seok stretches Korea's left side, carrying into space and serving crosses before defenses settle.
Lee Tae-seok.noteZh: 李泰锡能拉开韩国左路，带球进入空间，并在防线站稳前送出传中。

Oh Hyeon-gyu.summary: Oh Hyeon-gyu is a South Korea centre-forward from Beşiktaş who adds strength, penalty-box movement, and direct finishing.
Oh Hyeon-gyu.note: Oh gives Korea a stronger No. 9 profile, attacking near-post space and finishing through contact.
Oh Hyeon-gyu.noteZh: 吴贤揆为韩国提供更强壮的九号位形态，能冲击前点空间并在对抗中完成终结。

Paik Seung-ho.summary: Paik Seung-ho is a South Korea central midfielder from Birmingham City who adds deep passing, tempo control, and ball-winning balance.
Paik Seung-ho.note: Paik steadies Korea's midfield base, keeping passes moving and adding enough bite to protect transitions.
Paik Seung-ho.noteZh: 白昇浩稳住韩国中场底座，能保持传球流动，并增加足够硬度来保护攻守转换。

Park Jin-seob.summary: Park Jin-seob is a South Korea defensive midfielder from Zhejiang FC who adds screening, centre-back cover, and aerial bite.
Park Jin-seob.note: Park Jin-seob is Korea's defensive plug, able to sit in midfield or drop into the back line when needed.
Park Jin-seob.noteZh: 朴镇燮是韩国的防守补丁，能坐镇中场，也能在需要时回落到防线。

Seol Young-woo.summary: Seol Young-woo is a South Korea right-back from Red Star Belgrade who adds two-sided full-back cover, recovery speed, and attacking support.
Seol Young-woo.note: Seol gives Korea flexible full-back coverage, with enough recovery pace to support attacks and still retreat.
Seol Young-woo.noteZh: 薛英佑为韩国提供灵活的边后卫覆盖，有足够回追速度去支援进攻后再退回防守。

Son Heung-min.summary: Son Heung-min is South Korea's captain and Los Angeles FC forward, giving the national team elite movement, two-footed finishing, and transition threat.
Son Heung-min.note: South Korea's captain and main shot threat, still most dangerous when he can sprint into space behind defenders.
Son Heung-min.noteZh: 孙兴慜是韩国队长和主要射门威胁，在能冲到后卫身后空间时依然最危险。

Song Bum-keun.summary: Song Bum-keun is a South Korea goalkeeper from Jeonbuk Hyundai Motors who adds shot-stopping depth, size, and domestic rhythm.
Song Bum-keun.note: Song is the goalkeeper safety net, giving Korea a big shot-stopper with regular K League rhythm.
Song Bum-keun.noteZh: 宋范根是韩国的门将安全网，提供身材高大的扑救选择，并保持稳定的K联赛节奏。

Yang Hyun-jun.summary: Yang Hyun-jun is a South Korea winger from Celtic who adds direct dribbling, right-side speed, and one-on-one pressure.
Yang Hyun-jun.note: Yang is Korea's direct wide runner, useful for isolating full-backs and forcing defenders to turn.
Yang Hyun-jun.noteZh: 梁贤俊是韩国的直接型边路跑动点，适合单挑边后卫并迫使防守者转身。
